nodes.label: SuperTimers Running Screen
nodes.description: iOS app main screen showing a timer in running state with countdown display, plus a list of saved timer presets below.

nodes.label: Active Timer Section (실행 중인 타이머)
nodes.description: Top section labeled '실행 중인 타이머' showing the currently-running timer: title '라면 타이머', large countdown '7:59', total duration '8분', with a prominent orange circular pause button on the right.

nodes.label: Timer Presets List (타이머 목록)
nodes.description: Lower section labeled '타이머 목록' containing saved timer presets. Each row shows title, large duration, alert schedule (e.g., '5분전 · 3분전 · 종료시'), and a color-coded circular play button.

nodes.label: Preset: 라면 타이머 #1 (8분)
nodes.description: Timer preset '라면 타이머' with #1 badge (orange pill tag indicating it is currently the active instance). Duration 8분, alerts at 5분전/3분전/종료시, orange play-circle icon.

nodes.label: Preset: 공부 집중 (25분)
nodes.description: Timer preset '공부 집중 (25분)' — a Pomodoro-style focus timer. Duration 25분, alerts at 5분전/종료시, purple play-circle icon.

nodes.label: Preset: 세탁기 (45분)
nodes.description: Timer preset '세탁기' — laundry timer. Duration 45분, alerts at 5분전/종료시, blue play-circle icon.

nodes.label: Preset: 런닝 인터벌 (30분)
nodes.description: Timer preset '런닝 인터벌' — running interval timer with multiple checkpoints. Duration 30분, alerts at 20분전/10분전/5분전/종료시, green play-circle icon.

nodes.label: Add Timer FAB (+ 타이머 추가)
nodes.description: Blue pill-shaped floating action button at the bottom labeled '+ 타이머 추가' for creating a new timer preset.

nodes.label: Design Pattern: Color-coded Timer Identity
nodes.description: Each timer preset is assigned a distinct color (orange/purple/blue/green) applied to its circular action button, letting users recognize timers at a glance and linking the active timer's pause button to its preset color.

nodes.label: Design Pattern: Multi-stage Alerts
nodes.description: Each preset exposes its alert schedule as a middle-dot-separated list (e.g., '20분전 · 10분전 · 5분전 · 종료시'), signaling that timers fire multiple interim alerts, not just a single end notification. This is the app's differentiating feature vs the stock iOS Clock timer.

nodes.label: Design Pattern: Active Instance Badge (#1)
nodes.description: The '#1' pill-shaped badge next to '라면 타이머' in the preset list indicates the preset is currently running as instance #1, linking the list row to the active timer section above. Suggests the app supports multiple concurrent instances of the same preset.

nodes.label: Design Pattern: iOS Native Look
nodes.description: Uses iOS status bar (4:43 / wifi / battery), grouped sections with light gray header labels, thin divider lines, large bold Korean typography, and SF-style rounded iconography — fitting Apple Human Interface Guidelines.

nodes.label: SuperTimers Home
nodes.description: iOS home screen for SuperTimers app showing scattered timer/clock-themed icons on a light gray background. A system notification permission dialog is centered on screen.

nodes.label: Status Bar (4:42)
nodes.description: iOS status bar at top showing time 4:42, signal dots, Wi-Fi icon, and full battery icon.

nodes.label: Stopwatch Icon (blue)
nodes.description: Blue rounded square icon with an analog stopwatch illustration, positioned upper-left.

nodes.label: Alarm Clock Icon (orange)
nodes.description: Orange rounded square icon with classic twin-bell alarm clock illustration.

nodes.label: Smartwatch Icon (purple)
nodes.description: Purple rounded square icon depicting a smartwatch/Apple Watch shape.

nodes.label: Bell Icon (red)
nodes.description: Red rounded square icon with a yellow notification bell emoji.

nodes.label: Play Button Icon (green)
nodes.description: Green rounded square icon with a white play triangle glyph.

nodes.label: Pause Button Icon (teal)
nodes.description: Teal rounded square icon with a white pause glyph.

nodes.label: Notification Permission Dialog
nodes.description: Native iOS system alert titled 'SuperTimers에서 알림을 보내고자 합니다.' with explanatory subtext about alerts, sounds and icon badges, and two buttons: '허용 안 함' (Don't Allow) and '허용' (Allow).

nodes.label: Deny Button (허용 안 함)
nodes.description: Left button on notification dialog labeled '허용 안 함'.

nodes.label: Allow Button (허용)
nodes.description: Right button on notification dialog labeled '허용'.

nodes.label: Footer Credit 'by Hyewon & Insong'
nodes.description: Small gray text at the bottom center of the screen reading 'by Hyewon & Insong'.

nodes.label: Onboarding / Notification Permission Request
nodes.description: First-run home screen where SuperTimers requests notification permission so timer alerts can reach the user.

nodes.label: SuperTimers Edit
nodes.description: iOS edit screen for creating a new timer ('새 타이머') in SuperTimers. Contains name input, duration slider (10분, range 0-60분), alarm section with draggable timeline (종료 1분 전) with blue and red endpoint markers, '알람 추가' button, and a primary '추가' button at bottom. Cancel button ('취소') in top-left.

nodes.label: 새 타이머 (New Timer Title)
nodes.description: Screen title indicating a new timer is being created.

nodes.label: 취소 (Cancel Button)
nodes.description: Pill-shaped Cancel button to dismiss the edit sheet.

nodes.label: 이름 / 타이머 이름 (Name Field)
nodes.description: Text input for the timer name with a blue circular color/avatar selector on the left and placeholder '타이머 이름'.

nodes.label: 타이머 시간 Slider (10분)
nodes.description: Duration picker with clock icon showing '10분'. Slider with range 0분 to 60분, current value marker labeled '10분' with glowing blue thumb.

nodes.label: 알람 Timeline (종료 1분 전)
nodes.description: Alarm configuration section. Label '종료 1분 전'. Horizontal timeline from '10분 전' to '종료' with a blue draggable cursor near end and a red dot representing the end alarm. Help text: '타임라인을 드래그하여 위치를 선택합니다. 빨간 점(종료 알람)을 탭하거나 커서를 이동해 수정합니다.'

nodes.label: 알람 추가 (Add Alarm)
nodes.description: Button with blue plus icon to add another alarm entry.

nodes.label: 추가 (Primary Add Button)
nodes.description: Full-width blue primary action button to confirm creating the new timer.

nodes.label: NoteQuiz (App Title)
nodes.description: App title 'NoteQuiz' displayed in large bold text at the top of the home screen.

nodes.label: Subtitle — 악보 음표 읽기 연습
nodes.description: Korean subtitle under the app title: '악보 음표 읽기 연습' (Sheet music note reading practice).

nodes.label: Section Header — 문제 유형 선택
nodes.description: Section header '문제 유형 선택' (Select Question Type) above the quiz type list.

nodes.label: Option — 높은음자리표 쉬움 (덧줄 2줄 이하)
nodes.description: Selected quiz option: Treble clef (높은음자리표), difficulty 쉬움 (Easy), range 덧줄 2줄 이하 (Ledger lines 2 or fewer). Checkbox is checked (blue filled), row has light blue highlight background.

nodes.label: Option — 높은음자리표 어려움 (덧줄 3~5줄)
nodes.description: Quiz option: Treble clef (높은음자리표), difficulty 어려움 (Hard), range 덧줄 3~5줄 (Ledger lines 3-5). Checkbox is unchecked.

nodes.label: Option — 낮은음자리표 쉬움 (덧줄 2줄 이하)
nodes.description: Quiz option: Bass clef (낮은음자리표), difficulty 쉬움 (Easy), range 덧줄 2줄 이하. Checkbox is unchecked.

nodes.label: Option — 낮은음자리표 어려움 (덧줄 3~5줄)
nodes.description: Quiz option: Bass clef (낮은음자리표), difficulty 어려움 (Hard), range 덧줄 3~5줄. Checkbox is unchecked.

nodes.label: Primary Button — 시작하기
nodes.description: Primary CTA button labeled '시작하기' (Start) at bottom-left, large rounded-rectangle with solid blue background and white text.

nodes.label: Secondary Button — 기록보기
nodes.description: Secondary button labeled '기록보기' (View Records) at bottom-right, rounded-rectangle with light blue background and blue text.

nodes.label: Pattern — Checklist Selection List
nodes.description: Screen uses a checklist/selection-list pattern: four rows each with checkbox, clef icon, title+difficulty label, and range descriptor on the right. Supports multi-select semantics typical of iOS list forms.

nodes.label: Platform — iOS
nodes.description: Status bar (time 4:31, wifi, battery) and overall visual style indicate iOS.

nodes.label: SuperMusicNote Splash
nodes.description: EXTRACTED: iOS splash screen for SuperNoteQuiz app. White background with centered bold black title 'SuperNoteQuiz' in middle of screen. Small Korean subtitle '음표 읽기 연습' (music note reading practice) appears near the bottom in light gray. Another instance of '음표 읽기 연습' appears faintly near the top. Standard iOS status bar at top shows time '4:25', Dynamic Island, signal indicators, WiFi and battery icons. Home indicator bar visible at bottom. INFERRED: Minimalist launch screen design typical of SwiftUI apps; the app helps users practice reading musical notes. AMBIGUOUS: App name discrepancy — image filename suggests 'SuperMusicNote' but displayed title is 'SuperNoteQuiz'.

nodes.label: 플레이 기록 (Play Records)
nodes.description: Screen header title reading '플레이 기록' centered at the top of the modal view, indicating this is the play history screen.

nodes.label: 닫기 Button
nodes.description: Pill-shaped white close button labeled '닫기' (Close) in the top-left corner, used to dismiss the modal sheet.

nodes.label: Empty State Message
nodes.description: Rounded white pill/capsule container with gray placeholder text '아직 플레이 기록이 없습니다' (No play records yet), displayed below the header.

nodes.label: Modal Sheet Presentation
nodes.description: Screen appears to be presented as an iOS modal sheet, inferred from the rounded top corners and lighter background behind the content area.

nodes.label: Light Theme Background
nodes.description: Light gray/off-white background with white rounded UI elements, consistent with iOS light mode.

nodes.label: iOS Status Bar
nodes.description: iOS status bar shows time 4:31, signal indicators, WiFi icon, and battery indicator at the top of the screen.

nodes.label: Empty Content Area
nodes.description: Large empty vertical space below the empty-state message, reserved for listing play records once they exist.

nodes.label: SuperFont Profile Downloaded
nodes.description: iOS in-app browser screen showing the SuperFont profile download flow. EXTRACTED: status bar shows 11:52 with signal, wifi, and battery (58%) indicators. Top-left has a 'Return to SuperFont' button with an up-left arrow icon in blue. A gray instructional card reads 'Profile Download' with steps: 'Tap Allow to download the profile.', 'When Profile Downloaded popup appears, tap Close.', 'Then tap SuperFont -> install in Settings'. An iOS system modal titled 'Profile Downloaded' overlays the screen with text 'Review the profile in the Settings app if you want to install it.' and a large blue 'Close' button. Bottom toolbar shows back arrow, a reader/page icon, URL '127.0.0.1', refresh icon, and a more (ellipsis) button. INFERRED: this is a configuration profile download step in an in-app WebView pointing at a local server (127.0.0.1), likely used to sideload a custom font profile. AMBIGUOUS: the exact mechanism for serving the profile from 127.0.0.1 and whether a local HTTP server is embedded in the app. confidence_score: 0.92

ui_elements.content: Profile Download steps referencing Allow, Profile Downloaded, Close, SuperFont install in Settings
Profile Downloaded — Review the profile in the Settings app if you want to install it.

nodes.label: SuperFont Google Fonts
nodes.description: iOS SuperFont app Google Fonts browsing screen at 4:29. Top tab bar shows 파일 추가, 사이트 추가 (selected), 내 폰트. Google Fonts source dropdown selected. Search bar for 폰트 검색. Preview text 'The quick brown fox jumps...' with font size slider (가 to 가). Category filter chips: 전체 (selected), Sans Serif, Serif, Display, Handwriting, Monospac(e). Status filter chips: 전체 (selected), 선택됨, 설치됨, 미설치. Sort options: 선택만, 인기순 (selected). Font list cards showing Roboto (18 styles), Open Sans (12 styles), Google Sans (8 styles), Inter (18 styles), each with preview text 'The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog', Sans Serif label, unchecked selection circle, expand chevron. Bottom CTA bar: 폰트를 체크하세요 (disabled state).

nodes.label: Google Fonts source dropdown
nodes.description: Dropdown selector showing 'Google Fonts' as the active font source, with globe icon and chevron-down indicator.

nodes.label: Font preview size slider
nodes.description: Preview text input showing 'The quick brown fox jumps...' with adjacent slider controlling preview font size (가 small to 가 large).

nodes.label: Category filter chips
nodes.description: Horizontal scroll chip row for font category filtering: 전체 (active black pill), Sans Serif, Serif, Display, Handwriting, Monospace (truncated).

nodes.label: Install status filters
nodes.description: Status/sort row: 전체 (active), 선택됨, 설치됨, 미설치 filter chips on left; 선택만 toggle and 인기순 sort selector on right.

nodes.label: Font list card pattern
nodes.description: Repeating card layout for each Google Font: font family name (Roboto/Open Sans/Google Sans/Inter), pangram preview 'The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog' rendered in that font, Sans Serif category label, style count (8/12/18 styles), circular select toggle, chevron to expand.

nodes.label: Bottom check CTA
nodes.description: Disabled-state bottom action bar with globe icon and 폰트를 체크하세요 label, prompting user to select fonts before proceeding.

nodes.label: SuperFont My Fonts
nodes.description: iOS SuperFont app 'My Fonts' (내 폰트) screen showing empty state with no installed fonts

nodes.label: Top Tab Bar
nodes.description: Segmented tab bar with three tabs: 파일 추가, 사이트 추가, 내 폰트 (selected)

nodes.label: 파일 추가 Tab
nodes.description: File add tab (unselected)

nodes.label: 사이트 추가 Tab
nodes.description: Site add tab (unselected)

nodes.label: 내 폰트 Tab (Selected)
nodes.description: My Fonts tab, currently selected with white background

nodes.label: Font Search Bar
nodes.description: Search input with magnifier icon and placeholder '폰트 검색'

nodes.label: Preview Text Field
nodes.description: Editable preview pangram 'The quick brown fox 123' with pencil icon

nodes.label: Font Size Slider
nodes.description: Slider with small 가 and large 가 icons on each end to adjust preview font size

nodes.label: Filter Chip Group
nodes.description: Filter chips: 전체 (selected, black), 선택됨, 설치됨, 미설치

nodes.label: 선택만 Toggle
nodes.description: Radio-style toggle '선택만' (show selected only), currently off

nodes.label: Sort Button 가나다 가나다순
nodes.description: Sort order button labeled '가나다 가나다순' (alphabetical sort)

nodes.label: Empty State
nodes.description: Empty state with circular 가가 avatar, title '설치된 폰트가 없습니다' and subtitle '위의 버튼을 눌러 새 폰트를 설치하세요'

nodes.label: Bottom CTA 재설치할 폰트 선택
nodes.description: Bottom bar button '가가 재설치할 폰트 선택' (select fonts to reinstall)

nodes.label: SuperFont Settings Install
nodes.description: EXTRACTED: iOS Settings app screen titled 'Warning' with SuperFont back link, showing an 'Unsigned Profile' section with text 'The profile is not signed.' and a blue 'Install' button in the top-right. A modal alert 'Install Profile' is overlaid with message 'Installing this profile will change settings on your iPhone.' and two buttons: 'Cancel' and red 'Install'. INFERRED: This is the iOS system profile installation confirmation dialog triggered by SuperFont's font profile installation flow.

nodes.label: Warning Title
nodes.description: EXTRACTED: Navigation bar title 'Warning' centered at top of screen.

nodes.label: SuperFont Back Link
nodes.description: EXTRACTED: Status bar breadcrumb showing '< SuperFont' indicating user came from the SuperFont app via URL scheme.

nodes.label: Unsigned Profile Notice
nodes.description: EXTRACTED: Section labeled 'Unsigned Profile' with a row stating 'The profile is not signed.'

nodes.label: Top Install Button
nodes.description: EXTRACTED: Blue pill-shaped 'Install' button in top-right corner of the navigation bar.

nodes.label: Install Profile Modal
nodes.description: EXTRACTED: Centered modal card titled 'Install Profile' with body text 'Installing this profile will change settings on your iPhone.' and two actions: gray 'Cancel' and red 'Install'.

nodes.label: Cancel Action
nodes.description: EXTRACTED: 'Cancel' button in the modal's bottom-left. INFERRED: Dismisses the install flow.

nodes.label: Install Confirm Action
nodes.description: EXTRACTED: Red 'Install' button in the modal's bottom-right. INFERRED: Red color signals a destructive/system-modifying action per iOS HIG conventions.

nodes.label: Close Button
nodes.description: EXTRACTED: Circular 'X' close button in the top-left of the screen to dismiss the profile install sheet.

nodes.label: SuperFont File Add
nodes.description: iOS SuperFont app 'File Add' screen showing an empty state for adding font files. EXTRACTED: Status bar (4:29, wifi, battery). Top segmented tab bar with three tabs: '파일 추가' (selected, pill-shaped with dark border), '사이트 추가', '내 폰트'. Center empty state: document-with-plus icon in gray, title '폰트 파일 추가' (bold), subtitle 'TTF, OTF, TTC, WOFF 또는 ZIP 파일을 추가하세요' (gray). Primary black pill-shaped CTA button '+ 파일 선택' below subtitle. Bottom input-like bar (gray pill) with document-plus icon and placeholder text '파일을 추가하세요'. INFERRED: Tapping '파일 선택' opens iOS document picker for font files; bottom bar appears to be a persistent add-entry shortcut. Layout follows iOS empty-state + bottom-bar pattern.

nodes.label: Top Tab Bar (파일 추가 / 사이트 추가 / 내 폰트)
nodes.description: EXTRACTED: Three-segment top tab with pill outline on active tab '파일 추가'. Inactive tabs '사이트 추가' and '내 폰트' in plain text. INFERRED: Custom segmented control, not default iOS UISegmentedControl (visual style differs).
nodes.norm_label: top tab bar (파일 추가 / 사이트 추가 / 내 폰트)

nodes.label: Empty State (폰트 파일 추가)
nodes.description: EXTRACTED: Centered illustration (document with plus badge), title '폰트 파일 추가', subtitle listing supported formats: TTF, OTF, TTC, WOFF, ZIP.

nodes.label: Primary CTA (+ 파일 선택)
nodes.description: EXTRACTED: Black pill-shaped primary button with white '+ 파일 선택' label. INFERRED: Triggers iOS document picker (UIDocumentPickerViewController) filtered for font file types.

nodes.label: Bottom Add Bar (파일을 추가하세요)
nodes.description: EXTRACTED: Gray rounded pill at bottom with document-plus icon and placeholder '파일을 추가하세요'. AMBIGUOUS: Could be a tap-to-add shortcut or an input field; exact interaction not determinable from a single screenshot.

nodes.label: SuperFont Safari Allow Profile
nodes.description: iOS Safari screenshot showing SuperFont profile download step. A dimmed Safari page displays instructions titled 'Profile Download': 'Tap Allow to download the profile. When Profile Downloaded popup appears, tap Close. Then tap SuperFont -> install in Settings'. A 'Return to SuperFont' link sits in the top-left. An iOS system alert is overlaid: '"127.0.0.1" is trying to download a configuration profile. Do you want to allow this?' with 'Ignore' and 'Allow' buttons. Safari bottom toolbar shows back arrow, reader icon, URL '127.0.0.1', refresh, and more menu. Status bar shows 11:52, signal, Wi-Fi, and 5% battery.

ui_elements.text: Then tap SuperFont -> install in Settings
"127.0.0.1" is trying to download a configuration profile. Do you want to allow this?

inferred_context.purpose: User must tap Allow to download the font configuration profile served from a local server (127.0.0.1)

Completion moves active exec-plans to completed folder
Plan Mode syncs to exec-plans which align with Tier 1+ workflow
Pre-push check prevents losing work on MERGED branches, enforcing feature branch strategy
Hook commits use improve type via github skill
Pre-push check is a reversibility guard for git actions
Consistent format enables greppable anomaly detection
Both describe device-specific SwiftUI layout conventions
SuperTimers is a SwiftUI iOS app subject to iPhone layout conventions
SuperTimers has drag timeline UI which uses gesture patterns
Both address SwiftUI presentation/layout glitches around system animations
Both constrain sheet usage patterns
Parallel write agents must use worktree isolation to avoid conflicts
Tier 3 pipeline is the concrete realization of Tier 3 workflow definition
Both constrain unnecessary additions beyond the task
Both emphasize doing only what is needed
saveVersion gates migration logic in decodeIfPresent pattern
DataStore envelope uses versioned saveVersion field
Legacy decode and migration tests are mandated
DataStore loads via decoder which follows the backward-compatible pattern
Timer presets likely use versioned JSON persistence matching this pattern
